conversation.text: I think I was overcharged on last month's bill.
I'm sorry to hear that. I'll escalate this to our billing team right away — they're best placed to review your invoice directly. Could I get your name and company?
Thank you, Tom. Could I also have your email address for our billing team to follow up?
Thank you. And your account or service number?

I have everything I need — Tom Bradley, Hartley Insurance UK, tom@hartley.co.uk, Account HART-UK-2023. Let me connect you with our billing team now. They will review your invoice and follow up directly.
Connecting you to our billing support team now. They will be in touch within 1 business day to review your account.
